user_prompt: in this script, if the file is a PNG image, please actually optimize the PNG file, removing metadata and using the best (but lossless) compression
agent_reply: PNG assets now go through a Pillow re-encode before gzip:
- Drops metadata by not carrying `pnginfo`, ICC, EXIF, or text chunks into the save.
- Rejects animated PNGs explicitly so an APNG is not silently flattened to one frame.
Pillow documents that PNG `optimize=True` spends extra work to make the output smaller, and that it uses zlib compression level 9 for that path.

The incremental PlatformIO build succeeded. Current `html/` does not contain a PNG yet, so [web_assets.h](/D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/inc/web_assets.h) did not change from the normal default packaging run.
